scripts.lint: bun run deps:policy && bun run ts:policy && bun run lint:biome && bun run lint:eslint
scripts.test: bun run deps:policy && bun run ts:policy && bun run test:policy && vitest run --exclude "scripts/check-*.test.mjs"
scripts.test:e2e: bun run build && bun scripts/e2e-phase2.ts && bun scripts/e2e-disposable-firefox.ts
scripts.extension:build: bun scripts/build-extension.ts && bun scripts/copy-extension-assets.ts && bun scripts/build-extension-archive.ts
scripts.extension:lint: bun run extension:build && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/extension
scripts.extension:run: bun run extension:build && web-ext run --source-dir dist/extension
scripts.build: bun run version:check && bun run deps:policy && bun run ts:policy && bun run build:packages && bun run build:binary && bun run extension:build
scripts.package:check: bun run build && bun run package && bun scripts/package-check.ts
scripts.release:check: bun run build && bun run package && bun scripts/release-check.ts
scripts.release:check:local: bun run build && bun run package && bun scripts/release-check.ts --allow-unsigned-local
scripts.release:check:signed: bun run build && bun run package && bun scripts/release-check.ts --require-signed-xpi
scripts.ci: bun run format:check && bun run version:check && bun run lint && bun run source:size && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run extension:lint && bun run package:check
